title: DDMCH Keonjhar Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Asst Surgeon / Medical Officer Posts
short_info: The latest Dharanidhar Medical College & Hospital Keonjhar (DDMCH Keonjhar) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Asst Surgeon / Medical Officer posts! Published on 15 May 2026 at Dharanidhar Medical College & Hospital Keonjhar Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 9 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the less than 45 years (Asst Surgeon) and less than 65 years (Medical Officer) age group and possessing an MBBS Degree, MD/DNB in Paediatrics, or Diploma in Paediatrics qualification can attend the walk-in interview on 29 May 2026. Find all details about the DDMCH

age_limit.details: Asst Surgeon: Less than 45 years Medical Officer: Less than 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree or equivalent recognized by MCI/NMC, MD/DNB in Paediatrics, Diploma in Paediatrics.
qualification.details: Asst Surgeon (MBBS): MBBS Degree or equivalent recognized by MCI/NMC, completed one year rotating internship, 6 months experience in Critical care management with ICU facilities preferred. Medical Officer (MNCU & Nursery Unit): MD/DNB in Paediatrics (1st preference), Diploma in Paediatrics (next preference), or MBBS Degree. General Eligibility: Permanent Registration with Central/State Medical Council.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Provisional Merit List Grievance Redressal Final Merit List Option Form Submission Appointment Order

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DDMCH Keonjhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 29 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all required documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Asst Surgeon / Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies available for the Asst Surgeon / Medical Officer positions at Dharanidhar Medical College & Hospital Keonjhar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Asst Surgeon post?
faq.answer: For the Asst Surgeon post, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree or equivalent recognized by MCI/NMC, have completed one year of rotating internship, and preferably have 6 months of experience in critical care management with ICU facilities.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered for both Asst Surgeon and Medical Officer posts is Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Medical Officer post is less than 65 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DDMCH Keonjhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, Document Verification, Provisional Merit List preparation, Grievance Redressal, Final Merit List, Option Form Submission, and finally, the Appointment Order.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Dharanidhar Medical College & Hospital Keonjhar, Odisha, 758001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting and registration time for the walk-in interview is from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM on 29 May 2026.
